prs_created.title: feat: add queue module bindings and tests
prs_created.description: Added Fable.Beam.Queue with 14 ImportAll bindings (new, is_empty, is_queue, len, in, in_r, head, last, tail, init, to_list, from_list, member, reverse, join, filter) and 5 Emit wrappers (out, outRear, peek, peekRear, split), plus 26 tests. Also backfilled README. Patch in run 24620382255.
